title: Enchancement Forge/Sinytra Connector Fix
description: Fixes enchancement not disabling enchantments when using Forge/Sinytra Connector.
body:
# [ONLY USE THE FEATURED VERSIONS, LATER VERSIONS WILL BREAK](https://modrinth.com/datapack/enchancement-forge-fix/version/1.0.0+mod)

Fixes enchancement not disabling enchantments when using Forge/Sinytra Connector.

Feel free to edit the pack yourself, the list of enchantments is the disabled ones.

[![Bisect Hosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/27a35bd7-ed14-41e1-8e13-7d7c54ada062.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/SPECIMEN)

Any questions, be sure to ask in the discord server!
